# Custom Agents

This folder contains project-level custom agents installed from
`github/awesome-copilot`.

## When To Use Which Agent

- `github-actions-expert.agent.md`: CI/CD hardening, workflow security,
  permissions, OIDC, action pinning, and supply-chain checks.
- `qa-subagent.agent.md`: test planning, edge-case analysis, bug hunting,
  and implementation verification.
- `specification.agent.md`: drafting or updating structured specifications
  before implementation.
- `repo-architect.agent.md`: validating and improving `.github` agentic
  structure, conventions, and templates.
- `custom-agent-foundry.agent.md`: designing new custom agents tailored to
  this repository's workflows.
- `se-technical-writer.agent.md`: technical documentation, tutorials, and
  developer-facing content.
- `modernization.agent.md`: deep analysis and modernization planning for
  larger refactors.
- `gem-documentation-writer.agent.md`: documentation generation with
  code-to-doc parity focus.

## Source

Installed from:
`https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/tree/main/agents`
